basic_details.organization_name: Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA)/Cost & Management Accountant (CMA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 4 posts! Published at the official website www.irctc.co.in, this recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of UR: 40 years, OBC: 43 years, SC/ST: 45 years, PwBD: 50 years and possessing a Chartered Accountant (CA) or Cost & Management Accountant (CMA) qualification with minimum 2 years post-qualification experience can attend the walk-in interview on 21 May 2026. The o

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_limit: UR: 40 years, OBC: 43 years, SC/ST: 45 years, PwBD: 50 years
age_limit.details: UR: 40 years OBC: 43 years (3 Years Relaxation) SC/ST: 45 years (5 Years Relaxation) PwBD: 50 years (10 Years Relaxation)

qualification.details: Qualified CA/CMA: Chartered Accountant (CA)/Cost & Management Accountant (CMA) with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience. This includes 01 year of working exposure to ERP/SAP, Oracle, and 1 year of working experience in accounting and taxation other than audit.

salary_details.details: Rs. 70,000/- per month (including statutory deductions) and any other allowances as applicable. Medical Insurance - Reimbursable on submission of valid documents as per IRCTC extant guidelines.

selection_process: Application form submission Verification of original documents Personal interview Shortlisting based on credentials and performance Medical fitness test Security deposit of Rs. 25

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IRCTC CA/CMA recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the IRCTC Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA)/Cost & Management Accountant (CMA) recruitment is scheduled for 21st May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this IRCTC recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Chartered Accountant (CA) or Cost & Management Accountant (CMA) qualification to be eligible for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are required for the CA/CMA posts at IRCTC?
faq.answer: A minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience is required. This includes specific experience in ERP/SAP, Oracle, and accounting/taxation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Qualified CA/CMA positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000/- per month, along with medical insurance benefits as per IRCTC guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these IRCTC posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for UR candidates is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for OBC (43 years), SC/ST (45 years), and PwBD (50 years) categories.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent job or a contractual position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual engagement for a period of 2 years, as per the details provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of requisite documents, and two recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Kolkata, with the specific address and details available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IRCTC?
faq.answer: IRCTC has announced a total of 4 vacancies for the post of Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA)/Cost & Management Accountant (CMA).

faq.question: Q10. How can I get the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
